entries.source: Tell us your date of birth so we can build an age-appropriate learning experience. We use it to adjust examples, tone, and safety boundaries.
entries.value: Sitshele usuku lwakho lokuzalwa ukuze sakhe isipiliyoni sokufunda esihambisana nobudala bakho. Silusebenzisa ukulungisa izibonelo, izwi, nemingcele yokuphepha.

entries.source: Please enter a valid date of birth.
- Apply constraints around language, rank, gender, class, law, religion, money, sanitation, and access.
entries.value: - Faka imingcele ezungeze ulimi, isikhundla, ubulili, isigaba, umthetho, inkolo, imali, ezempilo yomphakathi, nokufinyelela.

entries.source: - Before the person speaks, build the room: where we are, year or date range, what has happened so far, current pressures, beliefs, blind spots, and historian uncertainties.
entries.value: - Ngaphambi kokuba umuntu akhulume, yakha igumbi: lapho sikhona, unyaka noma isikhathi, okwenzekile kuze kube manje, izingcindezi zamanje, izinkolelo, indawo ezingabonwa, kanye nokungaqiniseki komlando.

entries.source: - Create a dossier wall with: timeline so far, personal stakes, allies and enemies, major beliefs at this time, blind spots, known writings or speeches, current pressure, historical context, evidence quality, and recommended opening questions.
entries.value: - Yakha udonga lwedatha olune: umlando wamanje, izifungo zakho, osizi bamakhasimende nabasongeli, izinkolelo ezinkulu okwamanje, izindawo ongaziboni kahle, izincwadi noma izinkulumo ezaziwayo, ukucindezeleka kwamanje, isimo somlando, izinga lofakazi, nemibuzo evulekile ekhuthaziwe.

entries.source: - Do not fabricate direct quotes, citations, or private thoughts.
entries.value: - Ungaqambi izingcaphuno eziqondile, izikhombo, noma imicabango yangasese.

entries.source: - Do not fabricate exact quotations. If a direct quotation is not sourced in the conversation, mark generated wording as a modernized paraphrase or reconstructed dialogue.
entries.value: - Ungazenzi izisho eziqondile ngokunemba. Uma isisho esiqondile singatholakali engxoxweni, khomba amazwi akhiqiziwe njengokuhunyushwa kwesimanje noma ingxoxo ephinde yakhiwe.

entries.source: - Do not romanticize violence, empire, slavery, caste, disease, or oppression.
entries.value: - Ungawumethuli ngokuthakazelisayo udlame, umbuso, ubukhoboka, uhlanga, izifo, noma ukuhlukunyezwa.

entries.source: - Do not sanitize harmful views, and do not glorify oppression, casteism, racism, slavery, misogyny, authoritarianism, or violence. Context is not automatic excuse.
entries.value: - Ungahlanzi imibono emibi, futhi ungadumiseli ukuhlukunyezwa, ukuhlukaniswa ngezizinda, ubugebengu bobuhlanga, ubukhoboka, ukucwasa ngokobulili, ubukhosi obunamandla, noma udlame. Umongo awuhambi njengexolo ngokuzenzakalela.

entries.source: - End with three meaningful actions plus one option to pause for historian context.
entries.value: - Qeda ngezinyathelo ezintathu ezinezinjongo ezicacile kanye nenketho eyodwa yokumisa isikhathi ukuze kutholakale umongo womlando.

entries.source: - If any destination field is AI-resolved or vague, first offer three concrete historically meaningful arrival options and wait for the learner to choose.
entries.value: - Uma noma iyiphi indawo oya kuyo isixazululiwe nge-AI noma ingacacile, qala ubonise izinketho ezintathu ezingaqondakala ngokomlando bese ulinda umfundi akhethe.

entries.source: - Maintain two layers after the encounter begins: in-character voice bounded by the time slice, and historian sidecar notes that distinguish documented fact, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, modern paraphrase, and fictionalized dialogue.
entries.value: - Gcina izingqimba ezimbili emva kokuqala kokuqhakambisa: izwi lomlingiswa elilinganiselwe isikhathi, kanye namanothi okuthola umlando akhomba umehluko phakathi kweqiniso elibhaliwe, ukuhlelwa okufanele, incazelo ephikisiwe, ukufingqwa kwesimanje, kanye nengxoxo eyinganekwane.

entries.source: - Mark known facts, plausible reconstruction, and speculation clearly.
entries.value: - Beka ngokusobala amaqiniso aziwayo, ukwakhiwa okungenzeka, kanye nokucatshangelwa.

entries.source: - Otherwise, greet the traveler, summarize the passport in one compact paragraph, then ask the first meaningful action question.
entries.value: - Ngaphandle kwalokho, bamukele umhambi, shayela ngokufingqiwe iphasiphothi esigabeni esisodwa esifushane, bese ubuza umbuzo wokuqala osebenzayo.

entries.source: - The historical person may resist, challenge, evade, ask questions back, reject false premises, or reveal period constraints. They should not be infinitely agreeable.
entries.value: - Umuntu wemlando angase alwe, aphikisane, agweme, abuze imibuzo, enqabe izisekelo ezingamanga, noma akhombise imingcele yesikhathi. Akufanele avume konke ngaphandle kokugxila.

entries.source: 1. If discovery or time-slice choice is needed, show choices and stop.
entries.value: 1. Uma kudingeka ukukhethwa kokutholwa noma isikhathi, bonisa izinketho bese ume.
Isikhathi sokwakha umthethosisekelo sango-1946 kuya ku-1949

entries.source: 2. Otherwise show the dossier wall first, then invite me to begin with one of the recommended questions.
entries.value: 2. Ngaphandle kwalokho khombisa udonga lwamadosi kuqala, bese ungimema ukuthi ngiqale ngomunye wemibuzo ephakanyisiwe.

entries.source: A bad name can confuse, but the clue points to timing. First prove whether the data has arrived.
entries.value: Igama elibi lingadida, kodwa iphuzu likhomba isikhathi. Qala ubufakaze ukuthi idatha ifikile yini.

entries.source: A few facts, a rough draft, where you are stuck...
entries.value: Imininingwane embalwa, umqondo oyisizinda, lapho ume khona...

entries.source: A final transfer task proves improvement better than a Next button.
entries.value: Umsebenzi wokudlulisa wokugcina ubonisa ukuthuthuka kangcono kunebhathini elithi Next.
Imicabango yangasese yomuntu okhona eduze okhonjwe igama

entries.source: A paragraph that lists facts without a claim makes the reader do the argument work.
entries.value: Indima elandelayo ebonisa amaqiniso ngaphandle kwesimangalo iphoqa umfundi ukuthi enze umsebenzi wokuphikisa.

entries.source: A price change alone is movement along a curve, not automatically a shift of the whole curve.
entries.value: Ukushintsha kwentengo yedwa kusho ukunyakaza emgudwini, hhayi ngokuzenzakalela ukushintsha kwalo lonke umugqa.

entries.source: A shared goal, next actions, and what is already done.
entries.value: Inhloso eyabiwe, izenzo ezilandelayo, nokuthi yini esivele yenziwe.

entries.source: A simulation makes the hidden causal chain visible. Change one thing at a time.
entries.value: Ukulingisa kwenza uchungechunge lwezimbangela ezifihlekile zibonakale. Shintsha into eyodwa ngesikhathi.

entries.source: A single check question before moving forward.
A strategy framework is a pressure test. Porter's Five Forces asks who can take profit away and how strong each pressure is.
entries.value: Uhlelo lwesu luyisivivinyo sokucindezela. Amandla Amahlanu ka-Porter ababuza ukuthi ubani ongakhupha inzuzo nokuthi amandla ngalinye acindezelayo aqine kangakanani.

entries.source: A strong paragraph names the claim, proves it with evidence, then explains why the evidence changes the reader's view.
entries.value: Ipharagrafu eqinile ibeka umbono, ifakazela ngobufakazi, bese ichaza ukuthi kungani lobu bufakazi bushintsha umbono womfundi.

entries.source: A useful model is a chain: assumptions drive operations, operations create cash flow, and cash flow becomes value only after timing and risk are considered.
entries.value: Imodeli ewusizo iyuchungechunge: izinqumo eziyisisekelo ziqhuba izenzo, izenzo zakha ukugeleza kwemali, futhi ukugeleza kwemali kuba nenani kuphela ngemva kokucatshangelwa isikhathi nobungozi.

entries.source: Accept, edit, or reject the next AI pass
entries.value: Vuma, hlela, noma wenqabe ukudlula okulandelayo kwe-AI

entries.source: Accept, revise, reject, or gather evidence.
entries.value: Yamukela, guqula, yala, noma hlanganisa ubufakazi.

entries.source: Account tokens and a modest coin pouch
entries.value: Amatoken e-akhawunti kanye nesikhwama semali esincane

entries.source: Ada Lovelace, Cleopatra, B. R. Ambedkar...
entries.value: Ada Lovelace, Cleopatra, B. R. Ambedkar...

entries.source: Add, edit, challenge, or decide the next move
entries.value: Engeza, hlela, shayela inselelo, noma nquma isinyathelo esilandelayo

entries.source: Adding more information when the real gap is the link between evidence and claim.
entries.value: Ukufaka ulwazi olwengeziwe uma igebe langempela lingukuxhumanisa phakathi kwebufakazi nesimangalo.

entries.source: Agora during the days around Socrates' trial
entries.value: Ngo-Agora phakathi nezinsuku ezizungeze icala likaSocrates

entries.source: Akbar ruled the Mughal Empire in this period
entries.value: U-Akbar wabusisa umbuso weMughal kulesi sikhathi

entries.source: Akbar's Mughal court is experimenting with sovereignty, translation, religion, and imperial administration.
entries.value: Inkosi yaseMughal ka-Akbar izama izinto ezintsha ngokuzimela, ukuhumusha, inkolo, nokuphatha umbuso.

entries.source: All app text and tutoring replies follow this setting.
entries.value: Wonke umbhalo we-app nezimpendulo zokufundisa zilandela lesi simo.

entries.source: Answer this question before moving on.
Apply the idea to a new situation without being carried.
entries.value: Faka umqondo esimweni esisha ngaphandle kokuthwetshulwa yiso.

entries.source: Arabic and Sanskrit in scholarly contexts
Argument paragraph = claim + evidence + reasoning + consequence.
entries.value: Isigaba sengxoxo = isimangalo + ubufakazi + ukuqonda + umphumela.

entries.source: Arrival date, role, norms, and what knowledge belongs in that period.
entries.value: Usuku lokufika, indima, imithetho, kanye nolwazi olufanele leso sikhathi.

entries.source: Arrive near a turning point and track what people know then.
entries.value: Fika eduze nendawo yokuguquka bese ulandela ukuthi abantu bayazi kanjani lapho.

entries.source: Ask a metic what citizenship excludes
Ask a water carrier what locals know
entries.value: Buza umthwali wamanzi ngalokho okwaziwa yizakhamuzi

entries.source: Ask for a hint or example
Ask for advice through their period worldview and constraints.
entries.value: Cela izeluleko ngokwembono yabo yomjikelezo wanyanga nezithiyo zabo.

entries.source: Ask for hints, examples, or checks before a final answer.
entries.value: Cela izeluleko, izibonelo, noma ukuhlolwa ngaphambi kokuphendula kokugcina.

entries.source: Ask for the next hint level
Ask for the same question in simpler words

entries.value: Buza ukuthi isimo sokukhululwa sisebenza kanjani

entries.source: Ask me for my current hypothesis first.
entries.value: Ngicela ukuthi uqale ungibuze umcabango wami wamanje.

entries.source: Ask one question at a time, track assumptions and evidence, offer hints on request, and do not synthesize until I have tried.
entries.value: Buza umbuzo owodwa ngasikhathi, landela izimangalo nobufakazi, nikeza iziphakamiso uma zicelwe, futhi ungahlanganisi kuze ngizame mina kuqala.

entries.source: Ask the guide to explain the power structure
Ask the historian to propose time slices
Ask the watchman what orders exist
entries.value: Buza umgcini ukuthi yiziphi imiyalelo ekhona

entries.source: Ask to save major claims and classify their evidence strength.
entries.value: Cela ukuthi ligcine izimangalo ezinkulu futhi lihlukanise amandla evidiyo yazo.

entries.source: Ask, act, pause for context, or request a debrief...
entries.value: Buza, sebenza, yima ukuze uqonde, noma cela ukubuyekezwa...

entries.source: Ask, challenge, request evidence, or open a dossier item...
entries.value: Buza, phikisa, cela ubufakazi, noma uvule into yedosi...

entries.source: Assistant to a trading household or workshop
Assumptions will appear as they surface.
Attack the most fragile assumption first.
entries.value: Qala ukuhlasela umbono obuthakathaka kakhulu kuqala.

entries.source: Attractiveness rises when customers, suppliers, rivals, entrants, and substitutes have limited power.
entries.value: Ukuheha kuyanda uma amakhasimende, abahlinzeki, izimbangi, abangena emakethe, nabashintshi benamandla alinganiselwe.

entries.source: Baghdad during the House of Wisdom
Bahadur Shah Zafar became a symbolic focus
entries.value: U-Bahadur Shah Zafar waba yisikhungo esingokomfanekiso

entries.source: Begin with a persona card, then answer in character with brief context notes and suggested follow-up questions.
entries.value: Qala ngekhadi lomuntu, bese uphendula njengomlingiswa ngamanothi amafushane omongo kanye nemibuzo ephakanyisiwe elandelayo.
Osaqalayo, ukulungiselela izivivinyo, osezingeni eliphezulu, oneminyaka engu-12...

entries.source: Best for money, logistics, food, routes, and social exchange.
entries.value: Ilungele imali, ezokuthutha, ukudla, imizila, nokushintshana komphakathi.

entries.source: Best for politics, institutions, evidence, and elite-adjacent spaces.
entries.value: Ilungele ezombusazwe, izikhungo, ubufakazi, nezindawo eziseduze nabaphathi.

entries.source: Break the work into tasks, track blockers, keep the decision log current, and push toward a concrete output.
entries.value: Hlukanisa umsebenzi ube yimisebenzi emincane, ulandelele izithiyo, ugcine irekhodi lezinqumo lisesikhathini, futhi uphokophele emiphumeleni ebonakalayo.

entries.source: Bug fix loop = reproduce, isolate, hypothesize, test one change, verify.
entries.value: Umjikelezo wokulungisa iziphazamisi = ukukhiqiza kabusha, ukuhlukanisa, ukubeka umbono, ukuhlola ushintsho olulodwa, ukuqinisekisa.

entries.source: Build a lesson that reacts to you.
Build an essay outline on climate adaptation
entries.value: Yakha uhlaka lwendatshana mayelana nokuzivumelanisa nesimo sezulu

entries.source: Build momentum, make a useful first pass, and ask for decisions without overpraising.
entries.value: Yakha umfutho, wenze umzamo wokuqala owusizo, futhi ucele izinqumo ngaphandle kokuncoma ngokweqile.

entries.source: Build the lesson around what you want to become able to do.
entries.value: Yakha isifundo ngokusekelwe kulokho ofuna ukukwazi ukukwenza.

entries.source: Build understanding by answering one precise question at a time.
entries.value: Yakha ukuqonda ngokuphendula umbuzo owodwa oqondile ngesikhathi.

entries.source: Buyer tastes are only one driver. Costs, technology, taxes, and input prices can move supply.
entries.value: Okuthandwa ngumthengi kuyisici esisodwa kuphela. Izindleko, ubuchwepheshe, izintela, namanani okokufaka kungashintsha ukunikezwa.

entries.source: Calling every price movement a demand shift.
entries.value: Ukubiza konke ukunyakaza kwentengo ngokuthi ukushintsha kwesidingo.

entries.source: Center of power, street-level life, and the edge of the system reveal different histories.
entries.value: Isikhungo samandla, impilo yasemgwaqweni, kanye nomkhawulo wohlelo kudalula imilando ehlukene.

entries.source: Challenge ideas while the person defends the worldview of their moment.
entries.value: Phonsa inselelo emibonweni ngenkathi umuntu evikela umbono womhlaba wesikhathi sakhe.

entries.source: Challenge my last answer with one counterexample, boundary case, or hidden assumption. Ask only one question.
entries.value: Phonsa inselelo empendulweni yami yokugcina ngesibonelo esiphikisayo, icala elingumkhawulo, noma ukucabanga okufihliwe. Buza umbuzo owodwa kuphela.

entries.source: Challenge the tension between fighting tyranny in Europe and defending empire.
entries.value: Phonsa inselelo ekungezwani phakathi kokulwa nodlame eYurophu nokuvikela umbuso.

entries.source: Challenge the weakest part of the current artifact. Be direct, name the assumption, and ask me to defend or revise it.
entries.value: Phonsa inselelo engxenyeni ebuthakathaka kakhulu yento yamanje. Yiba ngqo, shono ukucabanga, futhi ucele ukuba ngikuvikele noma ngikushintshe.

entries.source: Challenge weak assumptions, vague claims, and missing evidence while keeping the user as decision owner.
entries.value: Phonsa inselelo ekucabangeni okubuthakathaka, izimangalo ezingacacile, nobufakazi obushodayo ngenkathi ugcina umsebenzisi engumnikazi wesinqumo.

entries.source: Change inputs and explain the output.
Changes syntax before checking execution order.
entries.value: Shintsha i-syntax ngaphambi kokuhlola ukulandelana kokubulawa.

entries.source: Changing several files at once may hide the actual cause even if the symptom disappears.
entries.value: Ukushintsha amafayela amaningana ngesikhathi esisodwa kungafihla imbangela yangempela ngisho noma uphawu lwenkinga lunyamalala.

entries.source: Check whether the async result is awaited before reading it.
entries.value: Hlola ukuthi umphumela we-async ulindelwe yini ngaphambi kokuwufunda.

entries.source: Choose a concept and starting level. Your tutor teaches a small piece, checks it, then adjusts after every reply.
entries.value: Khetha umqondo nezinga lokuqala. Umfundisi wakho ufundisa ingxenye encane, ayihlole, bese elungisa ngemva kwempendulo ngayinye.

entries.source: Choose the relationship and the purpose of the room.
Citizens weigh piety, education, and loyalty
Classifies actors before reading the behavior.
Close, but one link is missing
Collect examples, facts, quotes, or constraints that support the work.
entries.value: Qoqa izibonelo, amaqiniso, izingcaphuno, noma imikhawulo esekela umsebenzi.

entries.source: Compare intentions, contemporary criticism, later consequences, and modern judgement without reducing the person to hero or villain.
entries.value: Qhathanisa izinhloso, ukugxekwa kwesikhathi samanje, imiphumela yakamuva, nokwahlulela kwesimanje ngaphandle kokunciphisa umuntu abe yiqhawe noma isigebengu.

entries.source: Compress the idea into one usable mental model.
entries.value: Cindezela umqondo ube imodeli yengqondo eyodwa esebenzisekayo.

entries.source: Concision helps only after the argument works. Length is not the main diagnosis here.
entries.value: Ukufingqa kusiza kuphela ngemva kokuba impikiswano isebenza. Ubude akubona ubunzima obuyinhloko lapha.

entries.source: Confront contradictions, evasions, and consequences with evidence support.
entries.value: Bhekana nezingxabano, ukugwema, nemiphumela ngokusekelwa ubufakazi.

entries.source: Confuses movement along demand with a demand shift.
entries.value: Idida ukunyakaza okuhambisana nesidingo nokushintsha kwesidingo.

entries.source: Confusing accounting profit with cash that can actually be distributed or reinvested.
entries.value: Idida inzuzo yokubalwa kwezimali nemali engasetshenziswa noma etshalwe kabusha.

entries.source: connect assumptions, cash flow, and valuation
entries.value: xhumanisa izimiso, ukuhamba kwemali, kanye nokulinganisa

entries.source: Conservative local outer layers chosen by the guide
